# Plugables — Gradle Plugins for Android

> Opinionated code-generation Gradle plugins for Android and Kotlin projects,
> published to the Gradle Plugin Portal.

## Plugins

- [typed-events](https://rohittp.com/plugables/typed-events): Generate typed analytics event functions from a YAML schema for Android. Override a single method to connect Firebase, Mixpanel, or any analytics backend.
- [viewmodel-stub](https://rohittp.com/plugables/viewmodel-stub): Generate ViewModel interfaces and no-op stubs from @ViewModelStub-annotated Kotlin classes. Ready for unit tests and Compose previews.
- [codeview](https://rohittp.com/plugables/codeview): Generate an interactive HTML report of every @Preview composable with per-composable click-to-IDE deep-links. Walks Compose's slot tree to map every on-screen rectangle back to its source line.
- [auto-assert](https://rohittp.com/plugables/auto-assert): Inject a static assertion call at the entry of every method on classes annotated with @AssertForAllCalls. AGP bytecode instrumentation for thread checks, invariant enforcement, and runtime guards.
- [branchmark](https://rohittp.com/plugables/branchmark): Stamp the Android debug launcher icon with the current git branch — a suffix ribbon and a prefix emoji — by reading the app's existing adaptive icon and generating only the banner overlay. Branch read as .../type/name (final two segments).

## Source

- [GitHub](https://github.com/rohittp0/plugables)
- [Gradle Plugin Portal](https://plugins.gradle.org/search?term=com.rohittp.plugables)
